wishes.text: Wishing you a year filled with infinite smiles and beautiful moments!
Happy Birthday to a genuinely wonderful soul. Shine bright!
May all your dreams take flight today. You deserve the world!
Cheers to another year of laughter, growth, and epic adventures!
Thank you for bringing so much light into all of our lives.
To my partner-in-crime: let's eat way too much cake today!
Wishing you health, peace, and abundance. Happy Birthday!
You are a spark of magic. Keep making the world a better place.

timeline.description: Our very first photo together. We were so shy back then!

timeline.description: Getting lost, singing to terrible radio songs, and finding that perfect local diner.

timeline.title: Concert Under the Stars
timeline.description: Standing in the rain, losing our voices, but feeling happier than ever.

timeline.title: The Surprise Dinner
timeline.description: Getting the whole gang together to celebrate your promotion. Success looks good on you!

timeline.title: Cozy Winter Cabin
timeline.description: Hot cocoa, board games, and watching the snow cover the pine trees.

paragraphs: Happy Birthday! Today, the world celebrates the day an incredibly special, kind, and inspiring person was born. I wanted to create something unique to remind you of how much you are cherished.

Looking back at all the memories we've shared over the past year—from getting lost on our wild road trips to those quiet nights laughing over silly inside jokes—I feel immensely grateful to have you in my life. You have a rare gift of bringing warmth, light, and laughter wherever you go.

As you step into this new chapter of your life, I wish you endless growth, exciting new opportunities, and the courage to pursue every single one of your dreams. Remember that you are stronger than you think and more loved than you can possibly imagine.
Have the most magical day today. Eat tons of cake, dance like nobody is watching, and make a beautiful wish. You deserve all the happiness this universe has to offer.
